skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The number of widgets a machine produced during each of 9 one-hour periods is shown.

12, 14, 15, 11, 17, 13, 12, 16, 11

What is the range of the number of widgets produced for the 9 one-hour periods?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The range is the difference between the maximum value (17) and the minimum value (11): 17 − 11 = 6.

Choice B is incorrect. This results from a computational error.

Choice C is incorrect. This results from a computational error.

Choice D is incorrect. This results from a computational error.
